kural: CRITICAL FORM FIDELITY — the uploaded product image is the ONLY source of truth: reproduce the handle EXACTLY — the precise lever shape, curve, angle and thickness; the exact rectangular backplate size and proportions; the exact screw-hole positions; the keyhole/WC slot; the exact matte finish and color (matte black stays PURE MATTE BLACK, never blue/navy). Do NOT redesign, simplify, restyle, stretch or change ANY part of the handle; the mounted handle must be 100% identical in form to the reference. Install it correctly and technically as the sharp hero. Keep the upper third calmer for a headline. Photorealistic professional interior photoshoot, ultra sharp product, softly blurred background. No text/logo/watermark. 4:5 vertical.
